content.en:
The god of the Underworld said again: "Everyone, this time the crisis is very big, the overall strength of the demon seed must be inferior to our realm god realm and the eternal realm, but the most terrifying thing about the demon seed is that he can demonize us, if he is caught by the demon seed, they have a way to transform our demon seed, even if our eternal Dao seed is not a big problem, they can also use some treasures to forcibly convert us into demon seeds." Therefore, it is possible that the number of their demon seeds will be larger and larger, while the number of our Eternal Realm God Realm will be smaller and smaller. "

Many Eternal Realm God Realms nodded, the bigger the demon seed, the more there are, this is indeed a troublesome matter.

Moreover, if the demon seed can't be defeated, it can also escape into a place similar to the abyss of despair, and fighting in such a place is very detrimental to the Eternal Realm God Realm.

Therefore, even if the strength of the realm of the gods is stronger than the demon seed abyss, it is still extremely afraid of the demon seed abyss.

Other than that.

The Demon Seed Abyss dares to casually invade the Realm of God and the Eternal Realm, but the Realm of the Realm of the Gods does not dare to invade the Demon Seed Abyss.

Unless an existence can be born that can sweep the entire demon seed abyss with its own strength, but there is no such powerhouse yet.

"At present, the Qiongshan Kingdom Alliance has been destroyed, and according to the results of the investigation, these demon seeds are currently separated, and they are looking for the Eternal Kingdom Alliance and destroy these Eternal Kingdom Alliances, so we need to act separately to stop them and kill these demon seeds as much as possible. The god of the underworld said.

"Yes!"

Many Eternal Realm Gods~ Realm nodded one after another.

They weren't happy either, but if they didn't stop it, it might be their turn to be their own eternal kingdom, or there would be nowhere to escape.

Besides, the Realm Court might also find him trouble afterwards.

Of course, they can salted the fish a little, and there is no need to be so desperate.

But soon, a word from the god of the underworld made their hearts moved.

"This time, the merit will be calculated based on your battle record, and the top 100 meritorious ones will be able to enter the realm of the Realm of the Gods, and they will even be able to get the quota for the relocation of the Eternal Realm to the realm of the Realm of the Gods. "The Underworld Shinto.

As soon as they heard this, many Eternal Realm God Realms were excited.

If you can enter the realm of the gods, it will naturally be excellent!

They all aspire to enter the realm of the gods, and this is the opportunity.

Of course, even the risk is worth it.

......

Ye Tian applied to act alone, he didn't want to be with other Eternal Realm God Realms.

And he chose an area and quickly shuttled through.

Soon.

Ye Tian shuttled to the side of an Eternal Realm Alliance, and according to the detection of the Boundary Court, there was the breath of the demon seed nearby.

However, the Realm Court could not accurately lock the location of the demon seed, and no matter how powerful the treasure was, it was impossible to lock it so accurately.

However, Ye Tian knew very well that the aura of the demon seed was difficult to hide, and if it really appeared, he could easily find the other party.

Then, he searched the area and finally came across the demon seed.

This is just an ordinary Eternal Realm God Realm's demon seed, and its strength is not strong.

Ye Tian used the Tianyan Peng Light Technique to shuttle over, and with a single blow to the Spear of the Ruin Sun, he instantly killed the other party, and then put away the corpse of this demon seed.

The corpse of the demon seed can be used as proof of the battle record, so naturally it should be kept and brought back.

"Go somewhere else!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to look for other demon seeds, as long as he didn't encounter too powerful demon seeds, he could easily kill them.

In addition, he also has to prevent a demon seed from finding the Endless Realm Alliance, so he has been on guard, and several of his replica bodies are looking for it in the territory of the Endless Realm, if he encounters the kind of demon seed that he can't contend with, he will have to run away with his family in advance.

It's something that can't be helped.

Fortunately, the Firmament Mountain Kingdom Alliance is too far away from the Endless Kingdom Alliance, so it is impossible to affect the Endless Kingdom Alliance in a short period of time.

"The thirteenth demon seed!"

After Ye Tian killed a demon seed, he muttered.

And he has been communicating with the Realm Court, and learned that the Realm Court branch is in great trouble, and many Eternal Realm God Realms have been killed, because there are many powerful demon seeds on the demon seed's side, and the demon seed is not highly intelligent, and almost all of them are not afraid of death, and the more they fight, the more courageous they become.

The point is that there are many places in the Eternal Realm that resemble the Abyss of Despair, and there are demon seeds there, and once these demon seeds are added, there are even more of them.

And if the Eternal Realm God Realm falls, there will be one less, and there will be one less demonized.

Therefore, up to now, the number of demon seeds has not decreased much, but the Eternal Realm God Realm of the Realm of the Realm Division has decreased a lot.

Now, many Eternal Realm God Realms were terrified and didn't dare to go and kill them.

In desperation, the Realm Court issued an announcement and took out some treasures as rewards, including resources that could help them condense the Eternal Realm Spirit, and even various resources to strengthen the Eternal Dao Species, almost everything.

Even, the Realm Court even took out the Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance, and a variety of medium-grade Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritances were clearly marked, and only the achievements contributed could be exchanged.

Other than that.

The Realm God Realm finally sent a group of Eternal Realm Gods to support.

In this way, the situation at the Eternal Border can be regarded as initially stabilized.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian received a summons for help.

"A batch of demon seeds have appeared in the Craggy Realm Alliance!"

After Ye Tian received the news, he immediately urged the empty card, locked the position, and then transmitted.

Due to the distance, the teleportation cannot be so fast, it takes a few minutes.

......

Alliance of Craggy Nations.

The six Eternal Realm Divine Realms were being besieged by more than twenty demon seeds, and if they hadn't had some means to save their lives, they would have died a long time ago.

And the countless Eternal Dao and Eternal Dao realm powerhouses in this Eternal Realm are all fleeing towards the death zone, and as for those who are weaker in cultivation, they don't even dare to enter the death zone, so they can only wait for death.

Thundered!!!!

Eternal kingdoms have been shattered everywhere, and borders have been shattered.

The battle in the Eternal Realm God Realm has caused too much damage to the environment, and if it is a long battle, many Eternal Realms here are estimated to collapse.

At this time, many living beings have been affected by the battle, which is also a helpless thing.

Suddenly.

One of the Eternal Realm God Realms was severely damaged, and only five Eternal Realm God Realms were left with combat power.

At this moment, they were completely panicked.

They also want to escape, but there are too many demon seeds here, more than twenty!

If you scatter and flee, you will die faster.

"Support has already arrived, and it is estimated that it will be here soon!"

An Eternal Realm God Realm spoke.

Airplanes!

The void is distorted, and this is the Eternal Realm God Realm using the Void Card.

This made the six Eternal Realm God Realm see the Hope Sword.
